findings: PREMARKET Day-3 tick. Market opens in ~15 min. No live Day-3 mark, no trades today, no open orders. Book carries into Day 3 with 10 grandfathered holdings and 78.57% deployment.

Macro backdrop is SPECIFICALLY unfavorable for the book's two largest cluster exposures: BFSI 35.91% (PSU Bank -2.19%, Private Bank -1%+) and Power 16.20% (Brent $103+, Iran escalation). Combined 52.11% of capital in flagged-weak sectors. Pharma 4.81% + FMCG 16.71% offset partially.

MAHABANK is the single highest-probability gap-down name: already -5.14% at Day-2 EOD, PSU-bank segment flagged weak, and the default_sl_pct lever for this name was already pulled at Day-2 15:00. If it gaps through -6% at open, the second-knob stacking (min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01) becomes the armed fire.

AUBANK 18.58% of capital (largest single holding, grandfathered above max_position_pct=0.15). Closed +0.69% unrealized; if Day-3 open pushes above +1% and strategy STILL silent, the 'oversize+gain+unacted' triangle becomes the strongest argument for strategy_reviewer intervention ahead of schedule.

Strategy-layer silence has extended through Day-2 close and overnight — cumulatively ~42h45m by market open (~5h45m of Day-2 trading session + Day-2 post-market + overnight). Cumulatively the longest stall since the bot went live. Day-3 activity resumption is the primary behavioral watch.

BFSI cluster 35.91% / 45.70%-of-deployed — 1.09 pp buffer to 37%-of-capital trigger. Into a weak-BFSI day, this buffer could compress quickly if MAHABANK/AUBANK/PNBHOUSING all trade heavy. AUBANK is resilient-to-positive (ICICI Q4 beat spillover); MAHABANK is the at-risk cluster member.

Power cluster 16.20% / 20.61%-of-deployed — 3.80 pp buffer to 20%-of-capital trigger. TORNTPOWER (+5.27% EOD) is the strong performer; ADANIPOWER and NTPC flat-to-negative. Brent + Iran adds macro pressure but Power is not the sharpest macro vector.
Cumulative book positive (+0.072%, +₹721.15) — Day 2 closed modestly in the green for the first time. Strategy-silence is not producing loss yet, just drift.

Deployed 78.57% — 8.57 pp over the 0.70 override cap (grandfathered). Cap continues to bind against all NEW admissions: zero admission surface exists until a SELL frees cash. This is the primary structural block.
No intraday positions (paper_positions empty). All exposure is CNC. No intraday-leverage or overnight-short exposure.

Current overrides (0.60 / 0.15 / 0.70 / 0.015 / 0.04) all structurally appropriate for the current exposure profile. No override is in the 'obsolete' or 'over-tightened' state; each has a live rationale tied to a concrete book characteristic.
actions_taken: No numeric override changes this tick. Holding min_confidence=0.60, max_position_pct=0.15, max_deployed_pct=0.70, default_sl_pct=0.015, max_sl_pct=0.04 (posture unchanged since Day-2 16:00 strategy review).

Discipline rationale: spec-driven 'no tightening without a firing numeric trigger.' At 09:00 premarket with NO live Day-3 mark and NO trades today, no trigger can have fired. The bearish macro is a forward-looking directional risk that will be resolvable at the first intraday snapshot (typically ~09:45 / ~10:30 tick). Pre-firing a lever on forecast rather than on realized price action would break the spec discipline that has kept the override posture coherent through Days 1–2.

Arming a Day-3 specific trigger: MAHABANK gap-down below -6% at/near open (₹76.61 level). If fired, stack second-knob on the 15:00 Day-2 default_sl_pct fire by tightening min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01. Rationale: this was the deferred second knob from the 14:00 Day-2 spec; a gap-down breach would be a NEW distinct event warranting escalation (Day-2 trigger was -5% priority-watch breach; Day-3 trigger is -6% gap-down, a meaningfully more severe threshold).

Flagging IndusInd Bank Q4 earnings (5:00 PM IST) as late-session event risk for BFSI cluster. Not a pre-market lever action; if IndusInd prints and spills negatively into AUBANK/PNBHOUSING late-session marks, the 15:00/15:30 ticks may see the BFSI d-trigger (above 37%) fire from mark-to-market alone without any new admission.

Maintaining risk_level at MEDIUM, not HIGH. Rationale: composite HIGH-meta-trigger (strategy silent + MAHABANK below priority-watch + book below -0.5%) fails on component (iii) — book is positive at +0.072%. Strategy silence + MAHABANK watch are both firing as audit flags, but cumulative book P&L is still green. The pre-market negative-macro signal is a forecast, not a realized measure — elevating to HIGH would be premature.
actions_not_taken: Did NOT tighten daily_loss_limit_pct (0.03 → 0.025) preemptively. Reason: trigger (a) not fired — book is +0.072%, not below -1%. Tightening a loss gate before market even opens on a book that closed positive is plainly premature; no realized loss to backstop.

Did NOT raise min_confidence (0.60 → 0.65) preemptively despite weak-BFSI macro. Reason: trigger (d) not fired — BFSI at 35.91%, 1.09 pp buffer to 37%. Zero new admissions are possible anyway given the 0.70 deployed cap is binding — a stricter confidence gate has no admission surface to bite on. If BFSI crosses 37% intraday via mark (not new admission), will fire cleanly then.

Did NOT tighten max_deployed_pct (0.70 → 0.68). Reason: 8.57 pp binding gap is already maximum SELL-before-BUY friction. Tighter cap without an active SELL is decorative; trigger (b) [first SELL] has not fired in 42h45m.
Did NOT tighten max_position_pct (0.15 → 0.12). Reason: AUBANK 18.58% is grandfathered drift; a tighter cap cannot retract. No NEW entry can breach anyway given the deployed cap.

Did NOT stack min_sl_pct (0.005 → 0.01) on the existing MAHABANK 15:00 fire. Reason: the second-knob spec requires a NEW distinct breach (-6% gap-down) beyond the -5% trigger already fired. No new mark exists premarket to confirm breach. This trigger is ARMED for first intraday tick.

Did NOT elevate risk_level to HIGH. Reason: meta-trigger composite (silent + priority-watch + book below -0.5%) fails on book component — book is positive. Silence + MAHABANK watch alone are 2-of-3 and have been holding at 2-of-3 for multiple ticks; the third leg (book negative) is what would differentiate an escalation-worthy state.

Did NOT add a new numeric knob (e.g., sector_cap_pct_hard, max_stale_hours, gap_down_kill). Reason: existing knobs have not been shown ineffective by a firing trigger. Strategy-silence is the root failure vector and is a prompt-layer issue (addressed in the Day-1 EOD ORDER HYGIENE additions). Adding numeric knobs while the existing ones are working correctly is over-engineering.
reassessment_triggers_next_tick: (a) First intraday snapshot produces book below -1% (~-₹10,000) → tighten daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.025. High-probability fire vector if GIFT Nifty -0.8% translates to book -0.8–1% on directional exposure; 78.57% deployment means minimal cash buffer to dampen.

(a-EXTREME) If book opens below -2% (~-₹20,000) → ADDITIONAL elevation: risk_level to HIGH AND tighten daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.02. Combined with (a) this is a 2-step tightening in a single tick for a sharper-than-expected open.

(b) Strategy layer executes its FIRST SELL/EXIT since 2026-04-22 14:13 → read justification. If MAHABANK stop-out or AUBANK at-cost-plus trim: relax max_deployed_pct 0.70 → 0.72 (one-way, non-cumulative). Never above 0.75. Any new admission on freed cash: verify against cap AND require non-BFSI/non-Power (cluster discipline).
(c) Strategy admits NEW BUY in first 90 min despite 0.70 cap → verify math; if admission uses BFSI or Power name (4th in either cluster), tighten min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65.
(d) BFSI cluster climbs above 0.37 via mark OR new admission → tighten min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65. Currently 35.91%, 1.09 pp buffer. Weak-BFSI day compresses this fast.
(d-EXTREME) BFSI cluster above 0.40 → ADDITIONAL fire: max_position_pct 0.15 → 0.12 AND risk_level to HIGH. Aggressive: at 40% BFSI any single-name wobble is a book-level event.
(e) MAHABANK gaps/trades below -6.00% (₹76.61) → stack second-knob: min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01. ARMED for first intraday tick.
(e-EXTREME) MAHABANK below -8.00% (₹74.98) → ADDITIONAL fire: risk_level to HIGH AND flag for strategy_reviewer same-tick intervention (not wait for EOD). ADX-like trajectory reasoning: trend-aware.
(f) Strategy silence extends past 1st hour of Day-3 trading (10:15 IST) with zero activity → non-numeric but escalate to strategy_reviewer for same-day intervention consideration rather than EOD.
(g) Power cluster crosses 20% of CAPITAL via mark OR new Power admission → findings flag, no numeric lever (same as Day-2). Currently 16.20%, 3.80 pp buffer.
(AUBANK-specific) AUBANK crosses +1.0% AND still no SELL → flag as 'oversize+gain+unacted' triangle (all three on one name) for strategy_reviewer. Currently +0.69%, 31 bps from fire.

(IndusInd event) IndusInd Q4 print at 5:00 PM IST. If miss → likely negative BFSI sentiment spill to AUBANK/PNBHOUSING → trigger (d) fire-probability rises for 16:00/EOD tick. No premarket action; flagged for 15:00 tick preparation.

(meta-ARMED) If 10:30 tick shows ALL of: (i) strategy STILL silent, (ii) book below -0.5%, (iii) MAHABANK below -5.5% → ELEVATE risk_level to HIGH AND recommend strategy_reviewer same-day intervention. This is the Day-2 meta-trigger promoted forward with a tighter MAHABANK threshold (reflecting the already-fired -5% lever).
